name: robomme
description: Apply RoboMME to robomme problems. Technique: Memory is critical for long-horizon and history-dependent robotic manipulation. ...
paperTitle: RoboMME: Memory for Robotic Generalist Policies
content:
## Overview

This skill implements the technique from "RoboMME: Memory for Robotic Generalist Policies".

Key contribution: Memory is critical for long-horizon and history-dependent robotic manipulation. Such tasks often involve counting repeated actions or manipulating objects that become temporarily occluded.

## When to use

- Apply when solving robomme problems
- When baseline approaches are insufficient
- Working with structured problem spaces

## When NOT to use

- If problem constraints limit complexity
- When simpler methods achieve target performance
- Time-critical scenarios with strict latency needs

## Core Technique

The paper proposes an approach through:

1. Problem formulation from the paper
2. Algorithm implementation as described
3. Integration with existing systems
4. Evaluation against baselines

## Implementation

1. Understand problem requirements
2. Implement core algorithm components
3. Configure evaluation metrics from paper
4. Compare against baseline methods
5. Tune hyperparameters for your domain

## References

Paper: https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.04639
